headline: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of cruise company Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) jumped 4.3% in the afternoon session after its competitor, Royal Caribbean Group, reported strong first-quarter results that exceeded expectations, signaling broad strength across the cruise industry.
